name: slack-channel-reader
description: Read messages and threads from Slack channels. Exposes slack_read_channel and slack_read_thread tools.
author: Ocana Viva

SLACK_BOT_TOKEN.description: Slack Bot OAuth token (xoxb-...). Optional — if not set, the token is automatically read from the OpenClaw gateway config (channels.slack.botToken). Requires channels:history, groups:history, and channels:read scopes.

tools.name: slack_read_channel
tools.description: Read message history from a Slack channel

tools.name: slack_read_thread
tools.description: Read replies in a Slack thread
